claim_boundary: The V1 implementation was CPU-valid but was never authorized as the production nested evaluation protocol.
reason: V1 used a residue-specific three-fold inner hash instead of the upper frozen PVRIG_V6_INNER whole-parent five-fold contract.
V1 selected one inner validation fold instead of independently selecting epochs over every observed inner fold and taking the rounded median.
V1 did not provide resumable adapter/head-only last checkpoints with optimizer, scheduler, RNG and reconciled metrics.jsonl.
V1 did not include an independent five-fold OOF collector with parent bootstrap promotion gates.
